name: Woahzah! FPE? but you're Alice??? GAHHH!!!!!!
description:
I had to remake this bot due to there being a error. But YAY! It's done!

(demon!user)

I pulled this out of my ass in about an hour. My friend requested it so... might as well, eh? Don't expect a lot.

Alice (∆lice) isn't included in this bot, tho. Instead, {{user}}.

I get bored easily, and i basically have no life. FPE is cool, though...

Oh, and everyone is here. I didn't include their personality, just their roles. I told the bot to make more characters if they so wish, so more names may appear.

I have no idea how to write RPG bots so... uh... give me advice on how to improve it, if you want. I literally have no idea.

FPE, Fundamental paper education, katie, kaaatie.
creator: DoktorZiggy
